checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 32 node tests passed; MDE parser checked 67 files; traceability validator checked 19 files and required IDs through GEN-017/retrieval-pools-field-sum-top50-gen017; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: npm run cache:cranfield
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/retrieval-pools-field-sum-top50-gen017.json stores live OpenSearch field-sum top-50 retrieval pools for 225 Cranfield queries.

checks.name: npm run tune:cranfield:prf -- --retrieval-cache
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/prf-phrase-tuning-from-cache-gen017.json reproduced the refined PRF result from cache: MAP 0.2699, nDCG@10 0.3260, Precision@10 0.2680, Recall@10 0.4469, MRR 0.5622.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-017 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

blocked_or_skipped.name: remote final candidate evaluation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No new ranking behavior was selected; the cached tuner only reproduced the GEN-016 refined PRF result.

high_findings.summary: ARCH-0.2-candidate refined prf-rerank remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

medium_findings.summary: GEN-017 mitigated slow repeated remote retrieval during reranker tuning by caching first-stage field-sum pools.

evidence_quality: GEN-017 has one live OpenSearch cache refresh, one offline cached tuning reproduction, and one full local validation pass. It improves iteration speed and traceability, not the current best candidate score.
